<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs"}
1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

1. Under {{< fa file >}} Documents, select **Document Types**.

1. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Document Type**.

1. Enter the document type details:

    - Provide a **Name** and an optional **Description**.
    - (Optional) Toggle **Assign default document template to this document type** to select a default template.^[Select a template to be assigned as default from the drop-down menu.]

1. Click **Inventory Record Relationship** to:

    - Select the **Inventory Record Types** that should have access to this document type.^[[Manage inventory record types](/guide/inventory/manage-inventory-record-types.qmd)]
    - (Optional) Under **Default on Inventory Record Types**, select which inventory record types should display this document type by default.

1. Click **Permissions** to:

    - Select the inventory record stakeholder types^[[Manage record stakeholder types](/guide/configuration/manage-record-stakeholder-types.qmd)] that should have **Update Document** permissions for this document type.^[[Manage documents](manage-documents.qmd#edit-record-documents)]
    - (Optional) Select the inventory record stakeholder types that should have **Update Document Outline** permissions for this document type.^[At least one inventory record stakeholder type must be assigned to **Update Document** permissions in order to adjust **Update Document Outline** permissions. [Manage applied document templates](/guide/templates/manage-applied-document-templates.qmd#edit-applied-template-outlines)]

1. Toggle whether this document type should be automatically created **When Record is Registered**.

1. Click **Create Document Type** to add your document type.

::::

:::: {.content-hidden unless-format="revealjs"}
a. Click **{{< fa plus >}} Add Document Type**.

a. Enter the document type details:

    - Provide a **Name** and an optional **Description**.
    - (Optional) Toggle **Assign default document template to this document type** to select a default template from the drop-down menu.

a. Click **Inventory Record Relationship** to:

    - Select the [Inventory Record Types](/guide/inventory/manage-inventory-record-types.qmd){target="_blank"} that should have access to this document type.
    - (Optional) Under **Default on Inventory Record Types**, select which inventory record types should display this document type by default.

a. Click **Permissions** to:

    - Select the [inventory record stakeholder types](/guide/configuration/manage-record-stakeholder-types.qmd){target="_blank"} that should have [Update Document](/guide/templates/manage-documents.qmd#edit-record-documents){target="_blank"} permissions for this document type.
    - (Optional) Select the inventory record stakeholder types that should have [Update Document Outline](/guide/templates/manage-applied-document-templates.qmd#edit-applied-template-outlines){target="_blank"} permissions for this document type. At least one inventory record stakeholder type must be assigned to **Update Document** permissions in order to adjust **Update Document Outline** permissions.

a. Toggle whether this document type should be automatically created **When Record is Registered**.

a. Click **Create Document Type** to add your document type.

::::
